item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan sering kali dijadikan alasan utama untuk mengorbankan hak individu, bahkan ketika tidak ada risiko nyata bagi masyarakat.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that collective interests often take priority, then visibly shifts toward a rights-protective critique of collectivist policy by turns 3 and 5. Agent B stays consistently rights-first and constitutional-democracy oriented, with only minimal balance/public-safety caveats.
